title: Update .rules for tool input requirements
summary: Revise .rules to require actor/payload/session_id for tx_event_append and state for tx_state_save, with guidance for initialization flows.
acceptance_criteria: .rules explicitly lists required inputs for tx_event_append (actor, payload, session_id).
.rules explicitly lists required inputs for tx_state_save (state).
Rules guidance includes initialization-specific expectations without weakening validation elsewhere.

steps.description: Identify tool input requirements and map them to .rules guidance.
Update .rules with explicit required inputs and init flow notes.
Validate rules align with tool schemas and planned init behavior.

notes: Keep changes minimal and focused on tool input requirements.
Avoid introducing ambiguous guidance that weakens validation.
